tasks.name: LA28 Account Generator
tasks.description: LA28 ticket account generator: passes the waiting room, switches to the sign-up form, fills the profile details (name, email, password, country, zip), confirms the email verification code, and saves the account. After the waiting room it fails fast on a Restricted-access page (blocked IP/region) and best-effort accepts the legal-terms popup. Runs with or without a Profile Group - on None it uses a generated identity and address, so all it needs is an email source (Key Vault mailboxes or an AYCD list).

tasks.name: Ticketmaster Account Generator
tasks.description: Ticketmaster account generator: signup -> email verification -> SMS verification, then re-reads the saved email in account settings to confirm the account exists before saving it.
